race.comment: PICK WISELY (7) started favourite and looked to have every chance but was a bit plain last start over this distance at Echuca. Fizzed up pre-race which may be an excuse. Archie Alexander is persevering deep into the prep so maybe he has turned things around at home. Worth forgiving that last effort. TEMU TILLY (9) won her maiden over this distance two back at Cranbourne then led in a new role for her and folded late at Echuca last time. Can bounce back if ridden a little colder. HARD TO GO WRONG (2) blew the start and turned in last place before gathering momentum to get up for fourth when resuming over 1419m at Sale recently. Has a solid record at the mile so this likes a nice second-up option. CASH CONVERTER (4) wasn't beaten far by a subsequent city winner at Echuca last start. Gets the step up in trip he requires at the fourth run back. EVERY LITTLE THING (11) has been thereabouts at her last couple in similar races. Good each-way hope.
